/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -shared  -o nd_compress.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/nd_compress.dir/compress_bindings.cpp.o   -L/opt/spack/opt/spack/linux-zen2/igraph-0.10.15-a47zsqktlizro6w4g6rwe7aun4dlvfkv/lib  -L/opt/spack/opt/spack/linux-ubuntu20.04-zen2/gcc-9.4.0/libxml2-2.9.13-in2l3ore3p7kelp4o7t5yx3nxvbvqhh6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/spack/opt/spack/linux-zen2/igraph-0.10.15-a47zsqktlizro6w4g6rwe7aun4dlvfkv/lib:/opt/spack/opt/spack/linux-ubuntu20.04-zen2/gcc-9.4.0/libxml2-2.9.13-in2l3ore3p7kelp4o7t5yx3nxvbvqhh6/lib -ligraph -lxml2 /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so
